title: Pulisic trains apart; Poch says U.S. star 'good'
summary: US national team attacker Christian Pulisic trained off to the side as he recovers from a calf injury sustained in training, with coach Pochettino indicating he's doing well. Pulisic's fitness is crucial for the USMNT's World Cup campaign.
content: United States men's national team attacker Christian Pulisic trained off to the side at Monday's practice session as he attempts to recover from a calf injury he first sustained in training last week.

zh.title: 普利西奇单独训练；波切蒂诺称美国球星"状态不错"
zh.summary: 美国国家队前锋克里斯蒂亚诺·普利西奇在训练中因小腿伤恢复期间单独训练，教练波切蒂诺表示他状态良好。普利西奇的体能状况对美国队的世界杯战役至关重要。

title: Saudi Arabia hold off relentless Uruguay to earn draw
summary: Saudi Arabia earned a 1-1 draw against two-time world champion Uruguay in their Group H opener at Miami Stadium. The result demonstrates the smaller nation's ability to compete with tournament favorites.
content: Saudi Arabia hold firm against relentless pressure to earn a 1-1 draw against two-time world champions Uruguay in their Group H opener at the Miami Stadium.

zh.title: 沙特阿拉伯顶住乌拉圭猛烈攻势赢得平局
zh.summary: 沙特阿拉伯在迈阿密体育场H组首战中以1:1战平两次世界冠军乌拉圭。这个结果展示了这个规模较小国家与锦标赛夺冠热门竞争的能力。

title: Spain won't panic yet about Cape Verde draw, but t...
summary: Spain opened their 2026 World Cup campaign with a 0-0 draw against underdog Cape Verde, a surprising result given Spain's pedigree, though the team has historically started slowly at major tournaments.
content: Spain have a history of starting slowly at World Cups before finding their form, but nobody -- not even them -- expected to open 2026 with a draw against tiny Cape Verde.

zh.title: 西班牙对佛得角平局还未慌张，但...
zh.summary: 西班牙在2026年世界杯中以0:0战平不被看好的佛得角开局，考虑到西班牙的实力，这个结果令人惊讶，尽管该队在大型锦标赛中历来开局缓慢。

title: Cape Verde GK Vozinha stopped World Cup favorites ...
summary: Forty-year-old Cape Verde goalkeeper Vozinha has become one of the 2026 World Cup's most beloved players following his team's impressive performance. His journey from journeyman to World Cup standout has captured global attention.
content: Cape Verde goalkeeper Vozinha is a 40-year-old journeyman who is now one of the 2026 World Cup's most beloved players.

zh.title: 佛得角门神沃津哈阻挡世界杯热门球队
zh.summary: 四十岁的佛得角门神沃津哈凭借球队令人瞩目的表现，成为2026年世界杯最受欢迎的球员之一。他从籍籍无名球员到世界杯明星的历程已引起全球关注。

title: 'Huge goal!' - Araujo equalises for Uruguay against Saudi Arabia
summary: Maxi Araujo scored an 80th-minute equalizer for Uruguay against Saudi Arabia in Group H play. The goal helped Uruguay secure a 1-1 draw in their World Cup opener.
content: Maxi Araujo equalises in the 80th minute for Uruguay against Saudi Arabia at the Miami Stadium in their Group H encounter.

zh.title: "巨大的进球！" - 阿劳霍为乌拉圭扳平对阵沙特阿拉伯
zh.summary: 马克西·阿劳霍在第80分钟为乌拉圭打入扳平球，在H组比赛中对阵沙特阿拉伯。这粒进球帮助乌拉圭在世界杯首战中以1-1战平对手。

title: Lukaku seizes spotlight from Salah, De Bruyne in B...
summary: Romelu Lukaku delivered a strong performance for Belgium despite the team's struggles against Egypt, demonstrating the value of World Cup experience in a 1-1 draw.
content: While Belgium struggled at times vs. Egypt, Lukaku's display was a reminder of how valuable experience can be at the World Cup.

zh.title: 卢卡库从萨拉赫和德布劳内的阴影中脱颖而出
zh.summary: 罗梅卢·卢卡库尽管球队在对阵埃及的比赛中表现不佳，但仍为比利时队奉献了一场精彩表现，展现了世界杯经验的价值，最终1-1战平。
